# Polymarket Search

Search engine for Polymarket prediction markets. Better ranking than Polymarket's built-in search (BM25 + volume + LLM-enriched aliases + fuzzy matching). Static site, data refreshes every 30 minutes.

## JSON API (recommended for agents)

A curl-able JSON endpoint runs as a Cloudflare Worker. **Use this if possible — it's faster, cheaper, and works without JavaScript execution.**

```
https://polymarket-search-api.wkr0.workers.dev/?q=YOUR_QUERY
```

Examples:

```
curl 'https://polymarket-search-api.wkr0.workers.dev/?q=canada'
curl 'https://polymarket-search-api.wkr0.workers.dev/?q=bitcoin&limit=5'
curl 'https://polymarket-search-api.wkr0.workers.dev/?trending=1&limit=10'
```

### Parameters

- `q` (string) — search query. Supports typos, abbreviations, nicknames.
- `limit` (int, default 20, max 100) — number of results.
- `trending` (any value) — when `q` is empty, return top events by volume.

### Response shape

```json
{
  "query": "canada",
  "count": 5,
  "results": [
    {
      "q": "Event title",
      "s": "event-slug",
      "ed": "2026-12-31",
      "im": "https://...image url",
      "v": 12345,
      "vt": 678901,
      "tg": ["Tag1", "Tag2"],
      "mc": 3,
      "mk": [
        {
          "l": "Outcome label",
          "op": [0.42, 0.58],
          "bid": 0.41,
          "ask": 0.43,
          "last": 0.42
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

Field reference:
- `q` — event title
- `s` — Polymarket event slug. URL: `https://polymarket.com/event/{slug}`
- `ed` — end date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- `im` — event image URL
- `v` — 24h volume in USD
- `vt` — total volume in USD
- `tg` — Polymarket-assigned tags
- `mc` — total markets in event
- `mk` — top 5 outcomes by relevance
- `op` — [yes_probability, no_probability]. Already normalized for mutually-exclusive events.
- `bid`, `ask`, `last` — order book and last trade prices (in dollars, 0-1)

## Fallback: ?format=json on the static page

If you can't use the worker URL, the static site also supports `?format=json` on its URL:

```
https://aburkard.github.io/polymarket-search/?q=canada&format=json
```

This requires a JS-capable fetcher (headless browser, Playwright, Puppeteer) because the JSON is rendered client-side. **Prefer the worker URL above when possible.**

## Data refresh

Index rebuilds every 30 minutes via GitHub Actions. Live prices for displayed results are also fetched from Polymarket's Gamma API on demand by the browser UI.

## Source

https://github.com/aburkard/polymarket-search
